description: §48.3.4 — a non-deterministic call (`Date.now()`) inside a pure `fn` body SHALL fire E-FN-004. A zero-arg `fn` that reads the wall clock returns different values across calls, breaking referential transparency. Reject-path (pos) half of the E-FN-004 pin; the clean neg is `fn/deterministic-call-clean` (a pure arithmetic value of the inputs — silent). (`Math.random`, `crypto.randomUUID`, `performance.now`, and mutable global reads like `window.location` are the sibling triggers in the same clause.)
rationale: §48.3.4: `fn` must be a pure function of its inputs; a non-deterministic call (`Date.now`/`Math.random`/`crypto.randomUUID`/…) in a `fn` body is E-FN-004. Generate the value outside `fn` and pass it as a parameter.
